title: Diary of a Unicorn
original_title: Diary of a Unicorn: A Lifestyle Story
overview: Massage therapist, Georgia, is frustrated by her inattentive boyfriend. Deciding to explore her sexual desires as a unicorn, a person who joins a couple as their third partner, she fulfills her attraction to both men and women. However, her sexual indulgences become increasingly dangerous, putting her life at risk.
